caption:
New free California Games pop-up in London ☀️🏖️🍧

Step into California Games, an immersive two-day takeover at Outernet London✨

Take a cinematic journey through California’s iconic road trips, experience a taste of the Virgin Atlantic Clubhouse, play the classic 1980s California Games video game, enjoy interactive sports, live entertainment and California-inspired food😊

📆 12–13 June 2026
📍 Outernet London, Tottenham Court Road 

#london #thingstodo #visitcalifornia #virginatlanticholidays #popup
